# System Architecture Proposal

**Proposal Title:** [Brief description of the proposed change]

## Current Behavior
Quote or describe the relevant section(s) in SYSTEMS.md:

## Proposed Change
Describe the exact change you're proposing:

## Reason for Change
Why is this change necessary?

## Systems Affected
Which other systems or components would be impacted?

## Risk Level
- [ ] Low - Clarification only
- [ ] Medium - New mechanic with contained impact
- [ ] High - Major system change

## Backward Compatibility
- [ ] Compatible with existing implementations
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration)

## Implementation Notes
Any specific guidance for the implementation team.

## Additional Context
Links to design docs, related issues, etc.
